allow: Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\(""fs""\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(""./public/animations/papa-normal.json"",""utf8""\)\); const info={layers: d.layers ? d.layers.map\(l=>\({nm:l.nm, ty:l.ty, ind:l.ind}\)\) : null, assetCount: d.assets ? d.assets.length : 0, fr:d.fr, ip:d.ip, op:d.op, w:d.w, h:d.h}; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(info, null, 2\)\);')
